artifact: RDTD_result (RDT-D Parts 0+4: the identity, the SDDS mechanical verdict, the amendment inputs)
establishment: NOT ESTABLISHED -- output of RDTD_recompute.py; every number below is an OUTPUT pending its verifier scenario (orchestrator re-run of build/reserve/RDTD_recompute.py reproducing this file and the amended object byte-for-byte -- RDTD_verify.json all_pass=true -- and the RDT-D human gate).
no_date_no_probability_no_currency_guess: no breaking-point date, no probability, and no destination-currency guess appear in this artifact
units: all *_busd fields are billions of USD, 3 decimals

china_alone.delta_total_source: build/reserve/rdtc_safe_totals.csv fx_reserves_usd_bn: 3176.508 (2023-05) -> 3410.547 (2026-04); committed RDT-C convention, reconciled to RDTC_result.json branch_a delta_bn
china_alone.active_source: build/reserve/RDTC_class_panel.parquet active_musd summed over the axis; reconciled exactly to RDTC_class_flows.json residual_left_us_busd
china_alone.delta_H_source: build/reserve/RDTC_class_panel.parquet pos_musd: 2026-04 minus reference month 2023-04; reconciled exactly to RDTD_fragility.json delta_holdings_busd
china_alone.V_us_definition: ΔH_us_LT - active (valuation residual); ABSORBS the SLT reconciliation gap G (sized separately in RDTD_fragility.json)
china_alone.identity_check: ΔNonUS = ΔTotal(ex-gold) - ΔH_us_LT: +234.039 - (-260.938) = +494.977 $bn; equivalently ΔTotal + active - V_us = +234.039 + +446.493 - (+185.555) = +494.977 $bn
china_alone.meaning_discipline: ΔNonUS = the change in SAFE ex-gold reserves NOT accounted for by TIC-measured US LT securities; it still includes US T-bills (see the ST adjustment), USD deposits anywhere, and US assets in non-US custody. ΔNonUS != 'non-dollar'.

st_leg_adjustment.labelled: ADJUSTMENT beside the headline (LT-only identity is the headline), never silently added

china_belgium_luxembourg.active_source: build/reserve/RDTC_class_panel.parquet active_musd summed over the axis; reconciled exactly to RDTC_class_flows.json residual_left_us_busd
china_belgium_luxembourg.delta_H_source: build/reserve/RDTC_class_panel.parquet pos_musd: 2026-04 minus reference month 2023-04; reconciled exactly to RDTD_fragility.json delta_holdings_busd
china_belgium_luxembourg.V_us_definition: ΔH_us_LT - active (valuation residual); ABSORBS the SLT reconciliation gap G (sized separately in RDTD_fragility.json)
china_belgium_luxembourg.identity_check: ΔNonUS = ΔTotal(ex-gold) - ΔH_us_LT: +234.039 - (+806.285) = -572.246 $bn; equivalently ΔTotal + active - V_us = +234.039 + +326.323 - (+1132.608) = -572.246 $bn
china_belgium_luxembourg.meaning_discipline: ΔNonUS = the change in SAFE ex-gold reserves NOT accounted for by TIC-measured US LT securities; it still includes US T-bills (see the ST adjustment), USD deposits anywhere, and US assets in non-US custody. ΔNonUS != 'non-dollar'.

st_leg_adjustment.labelled: ADJUSTMENT beside the headline (LT-only identity is the headline), never silently added

st_leg.instrument_caveat: short-term U.S. TREASURY (bill) positions only -- no on-disk by-country position series exists for other US short-term instruments (agency discount notes, CP); bills sit near par so the position change is mostly flow
st_leg.convention: Δposition = pos(2026-04) - pos(2023-04) (reference-month convention, matching ΔH_us_LT)

pool_bound.statement: BOUND, not a number (rdtd_pool_determination.md): TIC 'China, Mainland' and the SAFE reserve pool are different perimeters -- neither contains the other. Direction (i): non-reserve mainland holders (CIC, state banks, private residents) make TIC-China OVERSTATE the reserve pool's US holdings; no on-ledger mitigation. Direction (ii): third-country custody (Euroclear/Belgium, Clearstream/Luxembourg, UK, Switzerland) makes TIC-China UNDERSTATE the pool's US holdings -- the CN+BE+LU custody variant is the on-ledger mitigation. Opposite signs, magnitudes not publicly quantifiable; no split is fabricated. The bound rides ΔH_us_LT, hence ΔNonUS AND the netted non-US-securities discriminator, in every use below.

fragility_integration.source: build/reserve/RDTD_fragility.json (Part 1, committed; recomputed values cross-checked here)
fragility_integration.band_override: NONE -- flag RELIABLE-WITHIN-GAP: the identity is carried in point form; G still reported and absorbed inside V_us

sdds_ledger.axis_note: SDDS covers the full verdict axis 2023-05..2026-04 (no truncation needed); latest published template month 2026-05 exceeds the axis end
sdds_ledger.delta_convention: value(2026-04) - value(2023-05), the RDT-C committed convention; Δsec+Δdep reproduces the committed ΔTotal(ex-gold) +234.039 exactly
blank_of_which_sub_lines: (1)(a) of which: issuer headquartered in reporting country but located abroad -- BLANK 2015-06..2026-05 except explicit 0 in 2017-04
(1)(b)(iii) of which: located in the reporting country -- BLANK except explicit 0 in 2015-07 and 2017-04
(5) loans to nonbank nonresidents -- BLANK except explicit 0 in 2017-04

netting_rule: pre-registered: the SDDS securities line INCLUDES US securities; the non-US-securities discriminator is Δsec_SDDS - ΔH_us_LT (per custody variant; the pool caveat rides it). Reading raw Δsec_SDDS as non-US purchases is the named dramatization vector and is not done anywhere here.

mechanical_verdict.rule: pre-registered 0.5 thresholds on the ΔNonUS midpoint, China-alone headline: DEPOSITS-SURGE iff Δdeposits_total >= 0.5 x ΔNonUS (and ΔNonUS > 0); NON-US-SECURITIES iff (Δsec_SDDS - ΔH_us_LT) >= 0.5 x ΔNonUS; both -> MIXED-COMPOSITION; neither/suppression -> OTHER-OR-SUPPRESSED (stating which)

china_alone.form: point (no band override; Part 1 flag RELIABLE-WITHIN-GAP)
china_alone.sentence: **NON-US-SECURITIES** -- the netted discriminator +482.729 $bn >= 0.5 x ΔNonUS (247.4885 $bn) and absorbs 97.5% of ΔNonUS; the deposits axis fails (+12.248 $bn)

china_belgium_luxembourg_beside_it.form: point (no band override; Part 1 flag RELIABLE-WITHIN-GAP)
china_belgium_luxembourg_beside_it.sentence: **OTHER-OR-SUPPRESSED** (sub-threshold, NOT suppression: every required SDDS line is populated in all 132 months; neither deposits +12.248 nor the netted discriminator -584.494 $bn reaches 0.5 x ΔNonUS = -286.123 $bn; ΔNonUS is NEGATIVE (-572.246 $bn) -- this perimeter's US LT holdings rose by more than the entire ex-gold reserve line)

st_adjusted_sensitivity_headline.labelled: SENSITIVITY only -- the pre-registered verdict is computed on the LT-only headline identity; the ST leg is reported beside it

mechanical_verdict.suppression_note: the manifest found NO suppression of required Section-I.A lines in any of 132 months; the suppression branch cannot fire on disclosure grounds -- the axes were evaluated numerically

expectation_evaluation.statement: the pre-registered primary expectation is REFUTED: the netted securities move absorb(s) >= half of ΔNonUS on the China-alone headline

honest_tensions.statement: BOUND, not a number (rdtd_pool_determination.md): TIC 'China, Mainland' and the SAFE reserve pool are different perimeters -- neither contains the other. Direction (i): non-reserve mainland holders (CIC, state banks, private residents) make TIC-China OVERSTATE the reserve pool's US holdings; no on-ledger mitigation. Direction (ii): third-country custody (Euroclear/Belgium, Clearstream/Luxembourg, UK, Switzerland) makes TIC-China UNDERSTATE the pool's US holdings -- the CN+BE+LU custody variant is the on-ledger mitigation. Opposite signs, magnitudes not publicly quantifiable; no split is fabricated. The bound rides ΔH_us_LT, hence ΔNonUS AND the netted non-US-securities discriminator, in every use below.

The SDDS securities line is total-of-all-currencies. The netted discriminator therefore identifies NON-US-ISSUER securities, NEVER non-dollar: a non-US issuer can issue USD paper, and US-issuer USD vs non-US-issuer is the ONLY distinction the netting makes. The k1 wall (RDT-B/C) stands; no currency is guessed.

Deposits are 0.08%..1.36% of the SDDS FX line in every one of 132 months, and moved +12.248 $bn over the axis. A CIPS/deposit-channel reallocation of reserves would surface on these lines and does not -- at reserve level, per China's own SDDS reporting, the deposit channel has no footprint. This is itself a finding, not a gap.

The template's of-which sub-lines are blank across the whole 2015-06..2026-05 panel (structural disclosure state, not interpolated): (1)(a) of which: issuer headquartered in reporting country but located abroad -- BLANK 2015-06..2026-05 except explicit 0 in 2017-04; (1)(b)(iii) of which: located in the reporting country -- BLANK except explicit 0 in 2015-07 and 2017-04; (5) loans to nonbank nonresidents -- BLANK except explicit 0 in 2017-04

V_us (+185.555 $bn china_alone) conflates true valuation change with the TIC transactions-vs-positions reconciliation gap: small for China-alone (G -4.560 $bn, ratio 0.0102) but 0.5022 for CN+BE+LU (G +163.866 $bn) -- the custody-center contrast that keeps the pooled variant context-only.

reconciliation.note: every guard above raises (build fails) rather than writing a mismatched number
